title: symphytum × hidcotense
intro: Symphytum × hidcotense, also known as Hidcote Comfrey, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the borage family and is a cross between Symphytum ibericum and Symphytum × uplandicum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of allantoin and rosmarinic acid. The health benefits of Hidcote Comfrey include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce joint pain and swelling, and support bone health. Hidcote Comfrey can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to promote skin and tissue repair.
